text_block_list.text:
On the way to my office, I hear a shrill<n>voice—one
that I recognize.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Impressive, Fuji.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you as well, Opera O! Your<n>performance
moved me to my core.
choice_data_list: Uh, is there a show going on?
Uh, is there a show going on?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, dance practice—no! Dare I say, a<n>dance battle!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have added my own personal flair to<n>the
assigned piece, to create my one<n>and only Operatic
Dance of Brilliance!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And I, on the other hand, have<n>maintained the
original choreography<n>in my Dance of Mighty
Expression!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Whose dance would sway the most<n>hearts? We
engaged in a duel to<n>answer that very question.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm an entertainer of sorts, the<n>challenge
struck a chord with me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Student Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Fuji won, hands down! No, Opera O's<n>dance was
better!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Could this be... a draw? What are we<n>to do? A
duet would be called for at<n>times like this in a play.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh! I've got it... Trainer! To the stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A good dance does not only allure, it<n>entices all
who see it to dance along.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
How right you are! In other words,<n>your trainer will
choose which of us<n>compels others to dance the
most.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! Now, choose! The Operatic<n>Dance of
Brilliance or the Dance of<n>Mighty Expression!
choice_data_list: The Operatic Dance of Brilliance, of course.
The Dance of Mighty Expression, I guess!

text_block_list.text:
Consider me one of the many who's<n>been
mesmerized by T.M. Opera O's<n>unique
perspective!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My dear trainer! I knew you<n>understood my allure!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now let us dance! Allow my radiant<n>presence to
ignite your body and<n>soul!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Three, two, step... Now do a shining<n>pose! Ready,
and—sha-bliiing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, so that is your pose ofbrilliance! Then... I shall pose like this!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I must admit defeat! You two are<n>completely
in sync—on many levels. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Superb, Trainer. It was a<n>fruitful battle, to
be sure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The possibilities of dance truly<n>blossom as a duet.
Your pose of<n>brilliance led me to realize this.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In winning concerts, we dance the<n>dance of
runners. And of course, as<n>the Overlord, with me at
the center.

I must shimmer with soul fire so as to<n>illuminate
those who accompany me<n>onstage—for the
Overlord brings out<n>the brilliance of others!

It appears she's learned the<n>importance of
performing with her<n>fellow dancers while
expressing<n>herself onstage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?!

Yes, originality is important, but you<n>have to
master the fundamentals first.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored that you would choose<n>me. Please,
be gentle!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, wonderful footwork! And...<n>considerably
cunning of you as well!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Don't tell me you don't feel<n>that piercing
gaze. You've lit a flame<n>inside her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh? The song has ended. That was a<n>joyful little
moment we had. For now,<n>so long!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Impressive. I felt the potential<n>of your
expressiveness.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And yet... you're so timid.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Surely, you felt too bashful to pair<n>with my
astounding beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Of course, I am the pinnacle ofperfection, so you are quite forgiven.But you must steel yourself for nexttime.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For when you take this hand, the<n>beauty of my
dance will have you<n>forget all those fears!

Not choosing T.M. Opera O as my<n>partner has
increased her motivation<n>to dance.
